title: Checking Equations for Dimensional Consistency
body: Consider quantities s, v, a, and $$t$$ with dimensions $$[s]=L$$, $$[v]={LT}^{\left(-1\right)}$$, $$[a]={LT}^{\left(-2\right)}$$, $$[t]=T$$. Determine whether each of the following equations is dimensionally consistent: (a) $$s=vt+0.5{at}^2$$ (b) $$s={vt}^2+0.5at$$ (c) $$v=sin\left(\frac{{at}^2}{s}\right)$$.
